responsibilities: Design, train, and deploy machine learning models that drive measurable business outcomes such as conversion and retention
Build robust, scalable data pipelines using Apache Spark and Airflow to support model training at scale
Implement feature engineering pipelines and feature stores to ensure consistent data across training and serving
Develop and maintain CI/CD pipelines for automated model training, validation, and deployment to production
Monitor deployed models for data drift, performance degradation, and bias, triggering retraining when necessary
Collaborate with data scientists to productionize experimental models into reliable, scalable services
Optimize model inference latency and throughput for real-time and batch prediction serving environments
Design A/B testing frameworks to evaluate model performance and quantify business impact of ML systems
Architect distributed training workflows to efficiently train models on large-scale datasets across GPU clusters
Document model architecture, assumptions, and limitations to ensure reproducibility and cross-team transparency
